title: Caller Voices
seoTitle: Game of Darts Caller Voices | BarkinMad Studios
description: Document Game of Darts caller audio assets, caller settings, and voice-control status verified from current source.
summary: The app includes caller audio folders for Daniel and Serena plus settings keys for caller and voice control behavior.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for pending Game of Darts caller voices image
sourceNotes: Caller folder names were verified from TheGameOfDarts/Sounds/Callers.
VoiceSettingsView is currently development-gated in inspected SettingsView code; release-facing availability is To Verify.

sections.heading: Caller Voices
paragraphs: Game of Darts includes optional match caller voices that announce scores and key moments throughout your games. The feature adds a more immersive match atmosphere while remaining easy to enable or disable.
The app uses Apple's built-in speech synthesis, providing clear, natural commentary without requiring additional downloads.

sections.heading: Available Voices
paragraphs: Two caller voices are currently available using Apple's built-in text-to-speech system.
bullets: Voice quality may vary slightly depending on your iOS version and installed system voices.

sections.heading: How Voice Calling Works
paragraphs: During a match, the selected caller announces scores and important game events to provide a more authentic darts experience. Voice announcements happen automatically during supported gameplay and require no additional setup once enabled.
The feature works entirely on your device using Apple's speech technology.

sections.heading: Voice Settings
paragraphs: Caller voices can be enabled, disabled or changed at any time from the app's settings. Players can switch between Daniel and Serena whenever they prefer without affecting saved games, statistics or player data.
